title: Steampunk Dirigible Market
alt: A fantastical, busy marketplace built on multiple levels under a large dirigible airship.

title: Elder with a Wisdom Beard
alt: Close-up portrait of an elderly man with a long, white, filament-like beard, looking thoughtfully to the side.

title: Gaze from the Depths
alt: Extreme close-up of a man's eye, with his face partially submerged in water.

title: Neon City Drive
alt: A long exposure shot of a city street at night with red and white light streaks from traffic.

title: Man in the Classic Car
alt: A well-dressed man sitting on the front of a classic vintage car on a cobblestone street.

title: Scholar in the Study
alt: A black and white photo of a man in vintage clothing sitting at a desk in a library filled with books.

title: Woman with Red Hair
alt: Portrait of a young woman with red hair and a leather jacket looking sternly at the camera.

title: Viking Ship on the Shore
alt: A Viking longship beached on a misty, rocky shore under a cloudy sky.

title: Woman with a Tulip
alt: A dramatic portrait of a woman looking down at a single red tulip she is holding.

title: Gorgon's Gaze
alt: A dark, artistic portrait of Medusa with snakes for hair, looking directly at the viewer.

title: Volcano and the Rider
alt: A black and white image of a motorcycle parked on a road with a large, smoking volcano in the background.

title: Winter Chapel
alt: A stark, black and white photo of a small church in a snow-covered field under a bright sun.
